_comment: Auth-gate bundle baseline, measured on ai/p0-quality @ base origin/ai/scene-kit-p0 (plan doc only, NO Scene Kit / pixi / three yet). This is the number the Scene Kit must not regress: pixi.js must ride the post-auth import() split in components/Minima.jsx (curriculum+engine are dynamically imported only when session is truthy), so it must NOT appear in the initial chunk set for route '/'. Regenerate with: npm run build && node bench/bundle-guard.mjs --update.

tolerance._comment: Allow small drift from unrelated shell changes; a real pixi leak (>100KB gz) blows past this. firstLoadJs is the authoritative Next-reported metric; disk bytes are a coarser secondary guard.
